dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4008 IS: Promoting Dental Health Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To reauthorize programs relating to oral health promotion and disease prevention.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Promoting Dental Health Act.
Section 317M of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 247b–14) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (d)(2), by striking 2010 through 2014 and inserting 2027 through 2031; and
in subsection (f), by striking 2001 through 2005 and inserting 2027 through 2031.
